name: Two eligible promotions (percent + fixed amount)
description: GetMemberPromotions program-process response. The ENVELOPE is the standard Loyalty Program Process Output, doc-confirmed across every process: { status (boolean), message, simulationDetails, outputParameters: { outputParameters: { results: [...] } } }. The CONTENTS of results[] are IMPLEMENTER-DEFINED, the per-promotion fields here (rewardType/discountValue) are the adapter's convention; promotionId/promotionName/loyaltyPromotionType mirror the doc's GetMemberPromotions sample.
notes: Unlike GPM promotion-execution, this does NOT return a priced cart, just eligible promotions. PromotionApplier.applyMemberPromotions applies each reward as an order-level discount. The envelope (status boolean, outputParameters.outputParameters.results, simulationDetails) is fixed and doc-confirmed; only the inner result fields are implementer-defined, confirm them with whoever configures the GetMemberPromotions process.
